basic_info.name: CrackNJ156
basic_info.description: Segmentation packaging of CrackNJ156, a manually annotated high-resolution pavement crack dataset collected on the NUIST campus under varied materials, weather, seasons, and illumination conditions.

imaging_setup.camera: Smartphone / CCD-based pavement imaging setup reported by source authors
imaging_setup.lighting_conditions: Natural illumination and street lamplight across varied weather and seasons

annotation_schema.description: Binary crack masks for pixelwise pavement crack segmentation

geographic_coverage.temporal_scope: Images collected in 2020 and 2021; published in 2022

quality_assurance.annotation_quality: Manually annotated pixel-level crack masks released with the Zenodo source package

authors.name: Zhengsen Xu

source_publication.article_title: Pavement crack detection from CCD images with a locally enhanced transformer network
source_publication.journal: International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation
